text: The U.S. Navy had drone tests disrupted after a Starlink outage cut communications, revealing how heavily the Pentagon depends on SpaceX. While Starlink is widely used because it’s cheap and global, the incident showed it can be a single point of failure. Despite these risks, the military still sees it as essential, since no alternative currently offers the same scale and capability. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 美国海军的无人机测试因星链（Starlink）中断导致通信切断而受到干扰，这揭示了五角大楼对SpaceX的依赖程度有多深。虽然星链因其廉价和全球覆盖的特性而被广泛使用，但此次事件表明它可能成为单一故障点。尽管存在这些风险，军方仍将其视为必不可少，因为目前还没有其他替代方案能提供同样的规模和能力。来源：路透社

text: Iranian Jews in Tehran gathered at the Yusef Abad synagogue for prayers and a ceremony. Community members stressed the conflict is not against Jews and warned against using Judaism to justify violence.
text_zh: 德黑兰的伊朗犹太人在优素福阿巴德（Yusef Abad）犹太会堂聚集，进行祈祷和仪式。社区成员强调，冲突并非针对犹太人，并警告不要利用犹太教来为暴力辩护。

text: The Spectator Index Indian oil refiners paid for Iranian oil using Chinese yuan, according to Reuters report. tweet
text_zh: 据路透社报道，印度炼油商使用人民币支付了伊朗石油的费用。推文

text: Open Source Intel For some reason, General Caine is involved. There are many possible explanations, but if the U.S. moves to support Hezbollah’s disarmament, it could make a serious difference. BIG: A senior Israeli official told i24NEWS that the United States plans to push for Hezbollah’s disarmament in coordination with the Lebanese government, using American resources to drive the effort. “President Trump wants this to happen, and this time the United States will be far more directly involved,” the official said. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：出于某种原因，凯恩将军参与其中。有很多可能的解释，但如果美国采取行动支持解除真主党的武装，可能会产生重大影响。重磅：一位以色列高级官员告诉 i24NEWS，美国计划在与黎巴嫩政府协调下，利用美国资源推动解除真主党的武装。“特朗普总统希望实现这一目标，而这一次美国将更直接地参与其中，”该官员表示。- 开源情报推文

text: Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : ✈️ 🇺🇸 🇫🇮 Training of Finnish pilots on the F-35A fighter. At Ebbing Air National Guard Base, the first flight of a Finnish pilot on an F-35A tactical fighter jet (tail number JF-502), developed for the needs of the Finnish Air Force, took place on April 15. The first group of Finnish pilots and technicians arrived at Ebbing Air Base in January of this year to undergo training for operating the F-35A. Since February, theoretical instruction and simulator-based training have been conducted. So far, eight F-35A Lightning II aircraft (JF-501 to JF-508) have been delivered for the Finnish Air Force. Tiny detail: once you start training on F-35s, you’re not exactly planning for peaceful birdwatching. Video made Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @StatWatch25 : ✈️ 🇺🇸 🇫🇮 芬兰飞行员进行 F-35A 战斗机训练。4 月 15 日，在埃宾空军国民警卫队基地，芬兰飞行员首次驾驶为芬兰空军需求开发的 F-35A 战术战斗机（尾号 JF-502）进行了飞行。第一批芬兰飞行员和技术人员于今年 1 月抵达埃宾空军基地，接受 F-35A 操作培训。自 2 月以来，已进行了理论指导和模拟器训练。到目前为止，已有 8 架 F-35A 闪电 II 飞机（JF-501 至 JF-508）交付给芬兰空军。小细节：一旦你开始进行 F-35 训练，你就不是在计划和平的观鸟活动了。视频由 Grok AI 制作推文

text: Open Source Intel BIG: A senior Israeli official told i24NEWS that the United States plans to push for Hezbollah’s disarmament in coordination with the Lebanese government, using American resources to drive the effort. “President Trump wants this to happen, and this time the United States will be far more directly involved,” the official said. tweet

With EU support, this includes the supply of long-range munitions, as well as the development of radar and anti-ballistic defense solutions.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Senator Lindsey Graham on Hezbollah ceasefire: “I do not trust the Lebanese military to disarm Hezbollah. The commander of the Lebanese military General Haykal needs to be replaced before there’s a credible plan to disarm Hezbollah. No peace deal in Lebanon until there’s a credible pathway to disarm Hezbollah.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆谈真主党停火：“我不相信黎巴嫩军队能解除真主党的武装。在有可靠的解除真主党武装计划之前，黎巴嫩军队指挥官海卡尔将军需要被撤换。在有可靠的解除真主党武装途径之前，黎巴嫩不会有和平协议。” 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇨🇺 BREAKING | Amid the anticipated agreement in the conflict with Iran, Donald Trump is reportedly preparing for actions against Cuba, likely aimed at regime change. Reports have already emerged that the Pentagon is developing plans for potential operations against Cuba. At the same time, a U.S. MQ-4C Triton unmanned aerial vehicle has begun active reconnaissance flights near Cuban territory. It is expected that Marco Rubio and Donald Trump may soon initiate more active steps toward regime change in Cuba, potentially involving the deployment of U.S. Armed Forces. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇨🇺 快讯 | 在与伊朗冲突达成预期协议之际，据报道唐纳德·特朗普正在为针对古巴的行动做准备，目标可能是政权更迭。已有报道称五角大楼正在制定针对古巴的潜在行动计划。与此同时，一架美国 MQ-4C“海神”无人机已开始在古巴领土附近进行积极的侦察飞行。预计马尔科·鲁比奥和唐纳德·特朗普可能很快会采取更积极的步骤推动古巴政权更迭，可能涉及部署美国武装部队。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Senator Graham: Iran is on the verge of financial ruin from the blockade.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员：伊朗因封锁正处于财政崩溃的边缘。

text: Senator Graham: I do not trust the Lebanese military to disarm Hezbollah. The commander of the Lebanese military—I think his name is Haykal—I don’t trust, as far as I can throw him. He needs to be replaced before there’s a credible plan to disarm Hezbollah. No peace deal in Lebanon until there’s a credible pathway to disarm Hezbollah.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员：我不相信黎巴嫩军队能解除真主党的武装。黎巴嫩军队的指挥官——我想他叫海卡尔——我对他一点都不信任。在有可靠的解除真主党武装计划之前，他需要被撤换。在有可靠的解除真主党武装途径之前，黎巴嫩不会有和平协议。

text: 🇺🇸 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: If you wake up in Tel Aviv, you read the newspaper, and what do you see? You see a diagram in the paper of the Ottoman Empire 2.0. The Ottoman Empire is Vienna to the Maldives. Right, this is the view that Israel is presenting of what Türkiye should be. You wake up in Istanbul, and you read the paper, and it's the Greater Israel, Vienna to the Maldives. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：如果你在特拉维夫醒来，读读报纸，你会看到什么？你会看到报纸上有一张奥斯曼帝国 2.0 的示意图。奥斯曼帝国的范围是从维也纳到马尔代夫。没错，这就是以色列所呈现的土耳其应该有的样子。如果你在伊斯坦布尔醒来，读读报纸，上面写的是大以色列，从维也纳到马尔代夫。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Senator Graham: Trump is directly talking to the Iranians. He is negotiating himself. He was on the phone with the Iranians a couple of days ago, and it got rather sporty—to the point that Trump loudly told Iran what would happen if they keep playing games. He actually lost his voice. I’d hate to be the Iranian on the receiving end of that.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员：特朗普正在直接与伊朗人对话。他正在亲自进行谈判。几天前他还在和伊朗人通电话，谈话变得相当激烈——以至于特朗普大声告诉伊朗，如果他们继续玩弄手段会发生什么。他甚至喊哑了嗓子。我可不想成为那个承受这一切的伊朗人。

text: 🇺🇸 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: Israel aligned with Türkiye, like Israel aligned with Abu Dhabi, like Saudi Arabia could be aligned with Israel—and for the prosperity of the Israeli people, to me, that's the answer. ﻿ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：以色列与土耳其结盟，就像以色列与阿布扎比结盟，就像沙特阿拉伯可能与以色列结盟一样——为了以色列人民的繁荣，对我来说，这就是答案。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Ambassador to Turkey Tom Barrack: "The only thing that's worked are these powerful leadership regimes: either benevolent monarchies, the kind of a monarchical republic. Everything else, this Arab Spring, just faded away and evaporated. Countries that have put on this cloak of democracy, or that we've gone after for human rights, have failed." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：“唯一行之有效的就是这些强大的领导政权：要么是仁慈的君主制，要么是某种君主共和制。其他的一切，比如阿拉伯之春，都只是逐渐消失并蒸发了。那些披上民主外衣，或者因为人权问题被我们针对的国家，都已经失败了。” 推文

text: WarTranslated Meanwhile Russians are gearing up for their May 9 victory cult, pumping out propaganda videos and invoking the grandfathers. This time they even put their Molniya in the shot. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045052801001123866/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Approximate IDF control in Lebanon during the ceasefire. No idea how Hezbollah agreed to this. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045052351594037354/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 停火期间以色列国防军在黎巴嫩的大致控制范围。不知道真主党是怎么同意这一点的。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045052351594037354/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Important points on the Hezbollah ceasefire: Israel explicitly preserves the right to strike at ANY TIME in self-defense against planned, imminent, or ongoing attacks or threats. So if Israel notices a Hezbollah member moving weapons in southern Lebanon, it will definitely drone him. This is the big one: Israeli forces are staying inside Lebanon, with no requirement to withdraw from a wide security zone. The IDF remains on the ground, holding key Hezbollah strongholds. Hezbollah was forced to agree to a ceasefire while Israel is still inside and in control. And lastly: Any future agreement with Lebanon would require Hezbollah to be dismantled. (Hard to believe, but we will see) A friend shared an interesting take on the Lebanon ceasefire. A little bit of cope, but maybe a possible option: Maybe Netanyahu wanted a short pause anyway. Independence Day is approaching and Israelis could use a moment to breathe. Announcing it himself would mean taking the political hit. So Trump makes the announcement. Netanyahu steps back and signals that after all the help the administration has done for Israel, refusing is not an option. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 关于真主党停火的重要点：以色列明确保留在任何时候出于自卫，针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击或威胁进行打击的权利。因此，如果以色列发现真主党成员在黎巴嫩南部转移武器，它肯定会用无人机将其消灭。这是最重要的一点：以色列军队将留在黎巴嫩境内，没有要求从广阔的安全区撤出。以色列国防军仍留在地面，控制着真主党的关键据点。真主党被迫在以色列仍留在境内并保持控制的情况下同意停火。最后：未来与黎巴嫩的任何协议都要求解散真主党。（很难相信，但我们拭目以待）一位朋友分享了对黎巴嫩停火的有趣看法。虽然有点自我安慰，但可能是一个可行的选择：也许内塔尼亚胡本来就想要一个短暂的停顿。独立日临近，以色列人需要喘口气。如果由他自己宣布，就意味着要承担政治打击。所以特朗普宣布了。内塔尼亚胡退后一步，暗示在政府为以色列提供了所有帮助之后，拒绝是不可能的。 - 开源情报 推文

text: Mehmet Seman Ağaoğlu, leader of the Iraqi Turkmen Front, was elected Governor of Kirkuk, a historic first for Turkmen in decades. Big deal because: — He is the first Turkmen governor in modern era. — Seen as a major political win for Turkmen representation. — Part of broader efforts to stabilize Kirkuk through shared governance. Ağaoğlu is a young, dynamic, and widely respected leader who gained support through his unifying and pragmatic approach. His leadership has helped boost stability and fair representation in Kirkuk, strengthening the Turkmen position.
text_zh: 伊拉克土库曼阵线领导人穆罕默德·塞曼·阿奥卢（Mehmet Seman Ağaoğlu）当选基尔库克省长，这是几十年来土库曼人历史上的首次。这意义重大，因为：——他是现代历史上第一位土库曼省长。——被视为土库曼人代表权的一次重大政治胜利。——这是通过共享治理稳定基尔库克更广泛努力的一部分。阿奥卢是一位年轻、充满活力且广受尊敬的领导人，他通过团结和务实的方法赢得了支持。他的领导有助于促进基尔库克的稳定和公平代表权，加强了土库曼人的地位。

text: 🇺🇦 Odessa region today 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 今天的敖德萨地区 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇴 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 During Russia's attack on the Izmail area in the Odessa region, a drone flew 16 km into Romanian territory according to the Romanian Ministry of Defense. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇴 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 据罗马尼亚国防部称，在俄罗斯袭击敖德萨地区的伊兹梅尔地区期间，一架无人机飞入了罗马尼亚领土 16 公里。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: If you looked at the region—and again, I'll be criticized for saying this because it's anti-democratic—the only thing that's worked, the only thing, are these powerful leadership regimes: either benevolent monarchies, the kind of a monarchical republic. Everything else, this Arab Spring, just faded away and evaporated. Countries that have put on this cloak of democracy, or that we've gone after for human rights, have failed.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：如果你审视这个地区——再说一次，我会因为这么说而受到批评，因为这被认为是反民主的——唯一行得通的，唯一的东西，就是这些强大的领导政权：要么是仁慈的君主制，要么是某种君主共和制。其他的一切，这场阿拉伯之春，只是逐渐消逝并蒸发了。那些披上民主外衣，或者因为人权问题被我们针对的国家，都失败了。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: The question on S-400s… For those of you who don’t know, Türkiye, after the coup, bought a Russian defense system. There was a variance in opinion—were we not willing to sell them Patriots, or could they not buy Patriots, but they bought an S-400 system. At the time, Türkiye was also the second-largest NATO ally. This is huge. When you think of what that means and what Türkiye is doing to protect Europe, it’s incredible. They wanted to contribute to the F-35 jet program and, as a matter of fact, were a partner in manufacturing fuselages. When they bought the S-400, Congress then imposed sanctions. Sanctions… in my humble opinion… they don’t work. The sanctioned country becomes so smart, so ingenious, they figure out ways around them. They went off the F-35 system. President Trump and President Erdogan… sat down. Halkbank is now fine. F-16s — renegotiating again. The alliance… is being rebuilt. I think you’re going to see this S-400 situation solved soon. From my boss’s point of view, acceptance into an F-35 program is fine. Greece has S-300s and F-35s. So, that the the Greece-Türkiye issue is you know, another historic issue. I won't even attempt to get there because they'll they'll forbid me to ever go to Mykonos again.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：关于S-400的问题……对于那些不知道的人，土耳其在政变后购买了俄罗斯的防御系统。当时意见不一——是我们不愿意卖给他们爱国者导弹，还是他们买不到爱国者，但他们确实购买了S-400系统。当时，土耳其还是北约第二大盟友。这意义重大。当你想到这意味着什么，以及土耳其为保护欧洲所做的一切时，这令人难以置信。他们想为F-35喷气式飞机项目做出贡献，事实上，他们还是机身制造的合作伙伴。当他们购买S-400时，国会随后实施了制裁。制裁……恕我直言……它们不起作用。被制裁的国家变得非常聪明、非常有创造力，他们会想出绕过制裁的方法。他们退出了F-35系统。特朗普总统和埃尔多安总统……坐下来谈了。Halkbank现在没事了。F-16——正在重新谈判。联盟……正在重建。我认为你很快就会看到S-400的情况得到解决。从我老板的角度来看，接受加入F-35项目是可以的。希腊有S-300和F-35。所以，希腊与土耳其的问题，你知道，是另一个历史性问题。我甚至不会尝试去触碰它，因为他们会禁止我再去米科诺斯岛。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: Israel aligned with Türkiye, like Israel aligned with Abu Dhabi, like Saudi Arabia could be aligned with Israel—and for the prosperity of the Israeli people, to me, that's the answer. So I think this rhetoric is going to go away. Türkiye is not a country to be messed with.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：以色列与土耳其结盟，就像以色列与阿布扎比结盟，就像沙特阿拉伯可以与以色列结盟一样——为了以色列人民的繁荣，对我来说，这就是答案。所以我认为这种言论会消失。土耳其不是一个可以被随意摆布的国家。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: This part of the world respects only one thing: power. And if you don’t reflect power, if you reflect weakness, you are on your heels. Syria is a great example of that. Why is Syria working? Because you have a powerful, strong, courageous leader that people may not have agreed with, whatever the points of views were in the past—but they see him leading someplace.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：世界的这一部分只尊重一件事：权力。如果你不展现权力，如果你展现软弱，你就会处于劣势。叙利亚就是一个很好的例子。为什么叙利亚行得通？因为你有一位强大、坚强、勇敢的领导人，人们过去可能不同意他的观点，无论过去的观点是什么——但他们看到他在引领某个方向。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: President Erdogan is an amazing leader, and Netanyahu is doing what he thinks is best for his country.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：埃尔多安总统是一位了不起的领导人，而内塔尼亚胡正在做他认为对他国家最有利的事情。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: Syria under the al-Sharaa regime has never fired a shot at Israel, quite the opposite. Israel has taken the point of view that the Druze in southern Israel and along the Syrian border are actually cousins of Israel. Netanyahu doesn’t care about borders. He doesn’t care about boundaries. Syria has been brilliant and not engaging adversarially against Israel. There’s no purpose in it. They have, time and time again, said we’re available to talk. The Syrians have showed tremendous patience. But in all these instances, we’re dealing with five countries on five borders, two seas. My bet is, we’ll get to a non-aggression and normalization agreement with Syria sooner than Lebanon.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：在沙拉政权下的叙利亚从未向以色列开过一枪，恰恰相反。以色列认为以色列南部和叙利亚边境沿线的德鲁兹人实际上是以色列的表亲。内塔尼亚胡不在乎边界。他不在乎界限。叙利亚表现得非常出色，没有与以色列进行对抗。这样做毫无意义。他们一次又一次地说我们愿意谈。叙利亚人表现出了极大的耐心。但在所有这些情况下，我们面对的是五个边境上的五个国家，两个海域。我敢打赌，我们与叙利亚达成互不侵犯和关系正常化协议的速度会比黎巴嫩更快。

text: 🇷🇺 Rostec has delivered a batch of Su-35S fighter jets to the military. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国家技术集团（Rostec）已向军方交付了一批苏-35S战斗机。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: Syria under the al-Sharaa regime has never fired a shot at Israel, quite the opposite. Israel has taken the point of view that the Druze in southern Israel and along the Syrian border are actually cousins of Israel. Netanyahu doesn’t care about borders. He doesn’t care about boundaries. Syria has been brilliant and not engaging adversarially against Israel. There’s no purpose in it. They have, time and time again, said we’re available to talk. The Syrians have showed tremendous patience. But in all these instances, we’re dealing with five countries on five borders, two seas. My bet is, we’ll get to a non-aggression and normalization agreement with Syria sooner than Lebanon.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：在沙拉政权下的叙利亚从未向以色列开过一枪，恰恰相反。以色列认为以色列南部和叙利亚边境沿线的德鲁兹人实际上是以色列的表亲。内塔尼亚胡不在乎边界。他不在乎界限。叙利亚表现得非常出色，没有与以色列进行对抗。这样做毫无意义。他们一次又一次地说我们愿意谈。叙利亚人表现出了极大的耐心。但在所有这些情况下，我们面对的是五个边境上的五个国家，两个海域。我敢打赌，我们与叙利亚达成互不侵犯和关系正常化协议的速度会比黎巴嫩更快。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: When you have a sovereign nation like Iran that is supporting a militia, you cannot get rid of that militia by killing them. It's the same philosophy in each country. You need to start with prosperity, from the individual to the family, to the tribe, to the community. And this is why, in my humble opinion—and I think the president, my boss's opinion—is left to the region: the Abraham Accords eventually is the answer. And Syria is an experiment alongside Türkiye, which is allowing them to do it. Türkiye, which happens to be the only real economy in the middle of this very complicated region, is a real nation.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：当你拥有像伊朗这样的主权国家支持民兵组织时，你无法通过消灭他们来消除该民兵组织。每个国家的哲学都是一样的。你需要从繁荣开始，从个人到家庭，到部落，再到社区。这就是为什么，以我的拙见——我认为总统，也就是我的老板的观点——留给该地区：亚伯拉罕协议最终是答案。叙利亚是与土耳其并行的实验，土耳其允许他们这样做。土耳其恰好是这个非常复杂的地区中唯一的真正经济体，是一个真正的国家。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Pressure to end or limit enrichment aims to strip Iran of deterrence, leaving it vulnerable to future war and fragmentation — Ebrahim Rezaei, spokesperson for Iran's National Security and Foreign Policy Committee.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗国家安全与外交政策委员会发言人易卜拉欣·雷扎伊表示，结束或限制浓缩活动的压力旨在剥夺伊朗的威慑力，使其在未来的战争和分裂中变得脆弱。

text: Open Source Intel The IDF arrested over 70 suspects and seized weapons and terror funds across Judea and Samaria over the past week. Operations targeted Hamas and Palestinian Islamic Jihad operatives. Forces confiscated M16 and M4 rifles, pistols, improvised firearms, ammunition, drones, and over 100,000 shekels in terror financing linked to Hamas. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：过去一周，以色列国防军在犹大和撒马利亚逮捕了70多名嫌疑人，并查获了武器和恐怖资金。行动针对哈马斯和巴勒斯坦伊斯兰圣战组织的成员。部队没收了M16和M4步枪、手枪、简易枪支、弹药、无人机以及超过10万谢克尔与哈马斯有关的恐怖融资。推文

text: Open Source Intel A friend shared an interesting take on the Lebanon ceasefire. A little bit of cope, but maybe a possible option: Maybe Netanyahu wanted a short pause anyway. Independence Day is approaching and Israelis could use a moment to breathe. Announcing it himself would mean taking the political hit. So Trump makes the announcement. Netanyahu steps back and signals that after all the help the administration has done for Israel, refusing is not an option. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位朋友分享了关于黎巴嫩停火的有趣看法。虽然有点自我安慰，但也许是一个可能的选择：也许内塔尼亚胡本来就想要一个短暂的停顿。独立日临近，以色列人需要喘口气。由他自己宣布意味着要承担政治打击。所以特朗普宣布了。内塔尼亚胡退后一步，暗示在政府为以色列提供了所有帮助之后，拒绝是不可能的。推文

text: Nuno Felix Russian appeasers talk a big game but fail to understand that you can tackle migrant flows and support a European country against the enemy who seeks to destroy our civilization I will always push back against anyone who tries to handcuff the remigration issue to any other question, be it geopolitical, economic, or ideological. Those people tend to start a purity spiral and exclude everyone who does not support their country of choice in a foreign war, or their preferred economic or ideological system, or their preferred answer to the decay of modernity from a broader remigration movement. They focus their destructive energy not on the real opponent, but on other right-wingers. They claim that only once the right is “purified” of “traitors” and “deviants” can it be successful. The opposite is true. We need to form a broad coalition around the most important issue: our ethnocultural existence and continuity. If you agree with this, you are in. But on board of the remigration train, you need to accept certain rules of decency and comradeship. Dissens is ok. Discussions are important. If you want to kick others out and call them traitors because they don’t agree with you on a certain issue, or don’t want to talk about a certain subject, then you should probably leave yourself. You are becoming a tool of the anti-remigration movement splintering and distracting our coalition. - Martin Sellner tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯：俄罗斯的绥靖者们说得头头是道，却不明白你可以既应对移民潮，又支持一个欧洲国家对抗试图摧毁我们文明的敌人。我将永远反对任何试图将再移民问题与其他任何问题（无论是地缘政治、经济还是意识形态）挂钩的人。这些人往往会陷入纯洁性螺旋，排斥所有不支持他们在外国战争中选择的国家、或他们偏好的经济或意识形态体系、或他们对现代性衰落的偏好答案的人，从而将其排除在更广泛的再移民运动之外。他们将破坏性能量集中在其他右翼人士身上，而不是真正的对手身上。他们声称，只有当右翼被“净化”了“叛徒”和“变节者”之后，才能取得成功。事实恰恰相反。我们需要围绕最重要的问题建立广泛的联盟：我们的民族文化存在和延续。如果你同意这一点，你就加入了。但在再移民的列车上，你需要接受一定的体面和同志情谊规则。异议是可以的。讨论很重要。如果你想把别人踢出去并称他们为叛徒，仅仅因为他们在某个问题上与你意见不一致，或者不想谈论某个话题，那么你可能应该自己离开。你正在成为反再移民运动的工具，分裂并分散了我们联盟的注意力。——马丁·塞尔纳 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇸🇪 🇷🇺 Sweden is preparing for the possibility that Russia could seize one of the Baltic Sea islands at any moment to test NATO’s response, The Times reports. 🔹 According to the armed forces chief, the Kremlin could carry out a limited naval operation as early as tomorrow to expose divisions within the alliance, particularly amid uncertainty linked to Trump’s statements. 🔹 “There are around 400,000 islands in the Baltic Sea, so the question is simply which one Russia might choose. Almost any of them would be enough to challenge the alliance. It wouldn’t need to be a large-scale operation — more of a symbolic move to assess the political reaction,” he said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇸🇪 🇷🇺 据《泰晤士报》报道，瑞典正在为俄罗斯可能随时占领波罗的海岛屿之一以测试北约反应的可能性做准备。🔹 据武装部队总参谋长称，克里姆林宫最早可能在明天进行有限的海军行动，以暴露联盟内部的分歧，特别是在与特朗普言论相关的不确定性背景下。🔹 “波罗的海大约有40万个岛屿，所以问题仅仅是俄罗斯可能会选择哪一个。几乎任何一个岛屿都足以挑战该联盟。这不需要大规模的行动——更多的是一种评估政治反应的象征性举动，”他说。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @christogrozev : More and more often, Putin gets directly and publicly blamed for Russia's collapsing economy. Something that was both unthinkable and very predictable only a year ago. https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1Ak2fKUm4m/ tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯 RT @christogrozev : 普京越来越频繁地被直接且公开地指责为俄罗斯经济崩溃的罪魁祸首。这在仅仅一年前还是不可想象且非常可预测的事情。https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1Ak2fKUm4m/ 推文

text_zh: WarTranslated：在被占领的马里乌波尔，@usf_army 操作员又摧毁了一套“铠甲-S1”防空系统。4月的16天内摧毁了16套防空系统。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045045412474544364/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel I’m now hearing the IDF drones over Lebanon, apparently IDF drones are permitted for surveillance on Hezbollah. tweet

text: Open Source Intel Updated Gaza map showing IDF control. 🔵 Blue indicates areas under IDF control 🟣 Purple marks areas of IDF withdrawal 🟡 Yellow indicates areas held by pro IDF militias 🔹 Light blue indicates areas the IDF is currently clearing Via @Stinky915846091 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045044799787438348/photo/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated Lasar’s Group of Ukraine’s National Guard hit a BM-30 Smerch cluster in Luhansk region, destroying one Smerch, a Slepok-1 fire control system and a reload vehicle, and damaging another. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045043261782249481/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：乌克兰国民警卫队Lasar小组在卢甘斯克地区击中了一辆BM-30“龙卷风”集束火箭炮，摧毁了一辆“龙卷风”、一套Slepok-1火控系统和一辆重装车，并损坏了另一辆。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045043261782249481/video/1 推文
